user.title: XTB Investments
user.description: Enter your XTB login and password. If XTB requires a one-time code, the next step will ask for the OTP sent by XTB.

otp.description: Enter the OTP code sent by XTB for this login attempt.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the XTB Bridge add-on.
error.invalid_auth: XTB rejected the login or OTP code.
